overall.description: A stationary third-person view of a medieval gothic magic classroom interior from a video game, featuring stone walls, tall arched windows with heavy curtains, and magical artifacts arranged on wooden tables. Characters in wizard robes enter and exit the fixed camera view, moving through the semicircular seating arrangement.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval magic classroom with semicircular student seating

events.description: NPC in beige robes walks from left side toward the center and exits the frame through the bottom
character in dark wizard robes enters from the bottom of the frame and walks toward the center of the room
NPC in beige robes re-enters from the bottom and walks back to the left side of the room

agents.ego_description: character in dark wizard robes enters the classroom from the bottom entrance and walks to the center of the semicircular seating area

notable_agents.action: NPC in beige robes stands near the left wall initially, exits toward the center at 12s, and returns to the left side at 55s
character in dark robes enters from bottom at 28s and stands in the center of the room

entered.detail: tall arched window with purple curtains allowing morning light to stream in
tall arched window with dark blue curtains on the right wall
large ornate circular rug with intricate designs covering the center floor area
curved wooden bench arrangement facing the center of the room
wooden table holding a crystal ball and other magical artifacts
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the right wall
framed portrait hanging on the stone wall to the left

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed in a high position overlooking a medieval magic classroom with gothic stone walls and tall arched windows. Morning light filters through purple and blue curtains, illuminating the circular rug and semicircular seating arrangement. An NPC in beige robes exits the scene, followed by the entrance of a character in dark wizard robes who walks to the center. The room contains wooden desks with crystal balls, a tall bookshelf, and various magical artifacts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed, high-angle perspective of a medieval gothic magic classroom as the focus shifts from the quiet environment to the arrival of a new figure. It begins with morning light filtering through purple and blue curtains, casting a soft glow over the stone walls and a circular rug centered within a semicircular seating arrangement. As an NPC in beige robes exits the frame, the stillness of the room is broken by the entrance of a character in dark wizard robes who walks toward the center. The camera continues to overlook the detailed space, capturing the wooden desks topped with crystal balls and a tall bookshelf filled with magical artifacts as the new character takes their place in the room.
